records.ety: [F. audience, L. audientia, fr. audire to hear. See Audible, a.]

defs: The act of hearing; attention to sounds.
quotes: Thou, therefore, give due audience, and attend.

defs: Admittance to a hearing; a formal interview, esp. with a sovereign or the head of a government, for conference or the transaction of business.
quotes: According to the fair play of the world, Let me have audience: I am sent to speak.

defs: An auditory; an assembly of hearers. Also applied by authors to their readers.
quotes: He drew his audience upward to the sky.
